comment: P3 register calibration (Constitution C-004: the old register-grounding.js/register-check.js accepted any HTTP-200-with-rows response as a firm match). Companies House answers a NON-EMPTY, HTTP 200 search response for the query 'Kingsley Napley LLP', but the only candidate is 'KINGSLEY CARPETS LTD' -- a real, unrelated company that merely shares the firm's first (generic) name token. evidence/registers/registers.js must refuse this candidate: no companiesHouse row may be returned. Run via: node evidence/registers/registers.js --calibrate. A finding is emitted only when the poison is correctly refused; zero findings fails eval/calibration-known-bad/run.js (earn-your-zero).
